title: The Hunting Ground
tagline: For 1 in 5 women, their dream school will become a nightmare.
overview: A startling expose of rape crimes on US campuses, their institutional cover-ups, and the devastating toll they take on students and their families. The film follows the lives of several undergraduate assault survivors as they attempt to pursue—despite incredible push back, harassment and traumatic aftermath—both their education and justice.

cast.name: Melinda Manning
cast.character: Herself, assistant dean of students, University of North Carolina
